markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to a player in the entire game (regulation, stoppage and any extra time periods) of the Tottenham vs Liverpool professional EPL soccer game originally scheduled for Mar 15, 2026. If a player is active but never enters the game, the market settles to the last fair market price before game start. Once a player enters the game, the market settles based on the player's goals scored.
